attribution_message: De'wI'vam vaD ghotpu' je qo' Qapla' mIw. batlh qaDmey 'ej yo'Sa'pu' Hoch!
brief_life_compass_instruction_1: loS Hurghmey vIje'pu'. latlh Hurghmey vIlo', 'ej ghu'vamvaD chIm lo'taH Qapla' mIw lo'.
brief_life_compass_instruction_2: vaj, wej Hurghmey pey vIlo'. SoH lutlhutlhmeH, Qapla' lo' 'e' vIghro'.
delete_local_data_warning: batlh: vaj Hoch mIv. HurghmeywIj yInobHa'.
description_help: loSDI' Qatlh. HurghmeywIj vIlo' yIghoS 'ej nuch yIjatlh.

introduction.disclaimer_description: vaj tlhIngan Hol lo'taH. batlh je Qapla' mIw, 'ach reH QuchHa'pu' lo'.
introduction.next_steps_description: Hurghmey yInobpu'. yItlhutlh 'ej Qapla' lo'vam yIghoS.
introduction.privacy_description: We respect your privacy. We do not track any of your actions or what you write. All your data remains local and is not shared with any external party.
introduction.what_is_description: Life Compass yIn Dalo'meH jan. tugh ngoQmey pIm 'ej reH chaw'be' ngoQmey - DIS qawHaqDaj tIchel 'ej yInlIj yIbuSqa'.
introduction.why_description: vIHtaH ngoQmeyraj DarurmeH, DIvI' DaSuqlaH. 'ach ngoQmey Dachaw'be'chugh, bIQoSlaHbe'. Life Compass Dalo'chugh, Hegh DuHaD 'ej Dochmey DanIDlaH.

name: pong

privacyPolicy.closing: vaj nuqneH, yIjatlh maH. batlh vIghro'.
privacyPolicy.dataExport: De' choq je - Hoch export, batlh Qapla'.
privacyPolicy.intro: batlh, data yInobpu' - vaj lo' mIw Sovbej.
privacyPolicy.noTracking: tracking Qapla'be'. qaStaHvIS mIw, tracking Sovbe'.
privacyPolicy.title: batlh data
privacyPolicy.userControl: You have full control over your data. It is stored securely on your device, and you can export or remove it at any time by clearing your browser's local storage.

remove_all_life_areas_warning: batlh: vaj Hoch Hurghmey mIv. DaHjaj qatlh?
remove_life_area_warning: batlh: Hurghmey mIv, Hoch data. qatlh DaHjaj?
satisfaction_help: vagh Hurghmey vIlo' - cha'loS, 1 maq, 10 Qapla'.
unsaved_changes_warning: batlh: pInpu' data pagh, DaHjaj qatlh?
compass_subline: Map what matters and how your week measured up.
empty_state_body: Add your first life area, or begin with a predefined set of common areas.
radar_view_heading: Your life compass at a glance

goals.dialog_description: yInDaq ngoQmey tIchel. ngoQmey tIbuS 'ej laSvarghmeychajDaq tIghor.
goals.empty_state: ngoQmey tu'lu'be'. wa'DIch ngoQ yIchel. reH ngoQ vIghro'vo' vItaghmoH.

page.title: Hoch, mu'mey QaQ
page.subtitle: chay Qap Life Compass 'ej nuqvo' Sor. Dochmey DaSeghbogh tIlaD, latlh yIlI'Ha' - mIw poS pagh.
page.disclaimer: Life Compass 'oH yInbuS jan'e' - QuchHa'pu' QaH pagh mIw qaSDI' qaSlu'meH jan ghaHbe'. 'ugh ghu' DaSIQchugh, DuQaHlaHbogh ghotvaD yIjatlh. KBT i primärvården Doch lo'.

welcome.title: potlhbogh Dochmey Dalegh'a' tammoHbogh Daq.
welcome.body: puS qImroqmey ngaj, vaj bIngaH. pagh chenmoH - reH bIlI'Ha'laH.

what.title: Hugh 'oH potlh'e', ngoQbe'
what.lede: Life Compass 'oH potlhbogh Dochmey DaSaHbogh Dalegh'e' tammoHbogh Daq - 'ej jajmeylIj chay rurchu'.
what.pull: pagh DalIHnIS - potlhbogh Doch yIpong neH, 'ej yISaH.
body: yIn HurghmeylIj DaSaHbogh tIpong - ghotpu', SuvwI', yuch, reH-Hot, nuqDaq SoHbogh - mu'meylIjDaq.
Hugh 'oH ngoQbe' DabuptaH 'ej DachoHbogh. 'oH Hugh DaqIHtaHbogh'e'. vaj naDev pagh rInmoHlu', 'ej pagh DaSlaHbe'.

weekly.title: Hoghvad wa'logh, wa' tammoHbogh ghel
weekly.lede: DaSaHDI', chay potlh rurchu' Hogh ghel - mu'mey QaQ jang, not pat.
body: patmey lI'lu'be' 'ej mISmey tlha'lu'be'. mu'mey Dajang - "Hopqu'" vo' "naQqu'"vaD - 'ej DaneHchugh nuch ghIt yIghIt, pagh ghIt.
Hoch mIw 'oH wIvbogh'e'. wa' Hurgh yIjang, pagh Hoch, pagh pagh. reH bImevlaH 'ej ghIlaHbogh ratlh.

pressure.title: tlha'be'. pagh polnISlu'
pressure.lede: Hogh DaSpu'chugh pagh DaQellaH. tlha'meH pagh tu'lu'.
pressure.pull: Hogh DaSpu', pagh jar. pagh DaQellaH.
body: wapDaj tlha'wI' ghaHbe'. not jaj tlha' naDmoH pagh ghIl Qaghvad maq - yIn tlha'be'mo'.
qaQongmoHmey Daghonpu'be'chugh chuHa'lu', Hoghvad wa'logh neH, 'ej HurghHa'choH neH. nI'bogh poH 'ej choH bIcheghchugh yIqeghqu', tammoHchu': pagh DalIHqa'nISbogh tu'lu'be'.

method.title: Sutmey Doypu'Daq chenta', tammoHchu'
method.lede: wa' ghot chegh ghu' chenta', QeD tIQ vangtaHvIS Hugh QuD.
body: Life Compass taghpu' chenmoHwI'Daj jan chenmoHbogh'e' Sutmey Doypu' DaSpu'meH, KBT i primärvården "Livskompass" Hugh QuD lo'taHvIS (KBT primärvård).
ghu'vam wagh 'oH bIchotwI': jup, ghojmoHwI' pagh ghISDen ghaHbe'. yInbuS jan 'oH - QuchHa'pu' QaH lo'mo' jan ghaHbe'. DaQubchugh, DuQaHlaHbogh ghotvaD yIjatlh.

data.title: janlIjDaq ratlh Hoch
data.lede: pagh tlha'lu' pagh nge'lu'. mojaq yIpol, wa' yIqem, pagh Hoch yIngaSHa' - reH DaneHDI'.
body: patlh tu'lu'be' 'ej De'wI' qach tu'lu'be'. Hoch DaghItlhbogh naDev browser-Daq yIntaH, 'ej pagh mejtaH.
reH mojaqlIj DaSeH: De'wI'ghItlhDaq yIchoq, wa' yIqem, pagh wa' mIwDaq Hoch yIlel.
